_meta.description: Canonical navigation layout applied AFTER all manifest.d fragments merge (see mergeManifestFragments in main.js). Fragments stay the source of WHAT exists in the menu (ADR-037); this file is the single place deciding WHERE entries live. relocations: sourceId -> targetGroupId (groups dissolve into the target, leaves move under it; a leaf whose target group does not exist stays top-level so nothing silently disappears). sections: menu-entry id -> section name. removals: leaf menu-entry ids retired as duplicate navigation — their PAGES stay routable for deep links and e2e specs. settingsSection: top-level config/definition/admin ids lifted into Nextcloud's settings foldout (NcAppNavigationSettings gear, OUTSIDE the scrollable nav) — see applySettingsSection in main.js; operational/report items stay in the main nav. Lives outside manifest.json because the app-manifest-v2 schema has additionalProperties:false at the root.
_meta._opencatalogi_note: opencatalogi shipped no menu-layout.json and scattered config/admin under a top-level 'Administration' (AdminGroup) group that duplicated the Settings gear. Resolution: SettingsMenu (action:user-settings) -> settings foldout; Organizations + Directory are OPERATIONAL (not admin) so they relocate to top-level; the now-empty AdminGroup shell is dropped by the relocation filter so only genuine settings live under the gear.
